_instructions: Manual DNF cause overrides for 2026. Jolpica AND FastF1 report every 2026 retirement as a generic 'Retired' with no cause, so we curate causes here. Fill in the cause for each driver below. ALLOWED VALUES: 'mechanical' = car/power-unit/reliability failure (this is the ONLY cause that elevates the team-mate's risk in the sim); 'collision' = contact with another car; 'driver_error' = solo crash/spin/off-track; 'other' = puncture from debris, illness, etc. Leave "" (empty) for any you're unsure of — those fall back to the generic blunt handling. Add new rounds as the season continues.
_source: Causes researched from race reports (formula1.com, planetf1, the-race, crash.net, speedcafe, formuladaily) 2026-06-15. mechanical=car/PU failure; collision=contact; driver_error=solo crash; other=external/freak.
